content.speakerTextCn: 那我的请假是批准了吗？

options.text: Yes, I'll send you the form tomorrow.
Yep, it's in the system. Enjoy your time with your mom.
I'm not sure, you should check with HR.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Yep, it's in the system. Enjoy your time with your mom.' 是对请假获批的明确确认，同时包含温暖的结束语。选项1是回应申请表的后续动作，不是确认批准；选项3和4都是否定性回应，与场景中‘已批准’的语境矛盾。

content.speakerText: Thanks so much for understanding. I really appreciate it.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你的理解，真的很感激。

options.text: You're welcome. Don't forget to submit the paperwork.
Yeah, whatever, just don't be late next time.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Of course, family comes first.' 是对感谢的自然、温暖且符合职场语境的回应，强调了同理心。选项1虽然礼貌，但转向了任务提醒，不够情感回应；选项3过于谦卑，削弱了支持感；选项4语气粗鲁，不符合职场礼仪。

content.speakerText: I'm leaving for my vacation tomorrow. Just wanted to confirm everything's settled.
content.speakerTextCn: 我明天要开始休假了，只是想确认一切已经安排好了。

options.text: Great! Just make sure you finish the report by EOD.
All set! Have a wonderful trip and don't worry about work.
I guess so. I'll check the calendar.
You're taking too many days off this year.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'All set! Have a wonderful trip and don't worry about work.' 完美结合了确认批准与温馨道别，符合场景核心。选项1强调任务，破坏放松氛围；选项3犹豫不决，缺乏明确确认；选项4负面评价，严重违反职场沟通原则。

content.hint: 用于确认请假、申请等是否获得批准的关键词
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇（approve 的正确使用）

content.hint: 表达理解与支持时最常使用的价值观短语
道别时常用且自然的口语表达

content.speakerTextCn: 那我的请假是批准了吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, confirmed! Enjoy your time with your family.
Yep, it's all set in the system.
Absolutely! We've processed your request — have a restful break.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认请假已批准
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：使用口语化表达，语气友好
关键词覆盖：包含 approved/set/in the system 等关键词

content.speakerText: Thanks so much for understanding. I really appreciate it.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你的理解，真的很感激。
expectedAnswers: Anytime! Take care and enjoy every moment with your mom.
No problem at all — family always comes first.
You're welcome! Feel free to reach out if you need anything before you leave.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：真诚回应感谢，强化积极关系
语言准确性：使用恰当的礼貌表达和固定搭配
表达自然度：语气温暖、符合职场语境
关键词覆盖：包含 family comes first / take care / anytime 等关键词

content.speakerText: I'm heading out for my long weekend. Just wanted to make sure you're all good with my schedule.
content.speakerTextCn: 我要去度长周末了，只是想确认你对我的排班没有问题。
expectedAnswers: All good! Have a relaxing break and see you Monday.
Confirmed! Don't stress about work — enjoy your time off.
Perfect! We've got everything covered while you're away.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰确认排班无问题，消除对方顾虑
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当
表达自然度：语气轻松、积极，符合轻松道别语境
关键词覆盖：包含 confirmed/all good/see you/relaxing 等关键词
